items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a green and white color scheme. the slide is titled "crime scene investigation" and contains two bullet points. the first bullet point states that the goal of csi is to recognize, document, and collect evidence at the scene of a crime. the second bullet point explains that solving the crime will depend on piecing together the evidence to form a picture of what happened at the crime scene. the background of the slide has a subtle pattern that resembles a crime scene tape, with yellow dots and a faint image of a fingerprint at the top right corner. the slide is numbered "2" in the bottom right corner, indicating it is part of a larger presentation.
